zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas West於1321年出生在英國諾福爾可普斯亞德時，他的父親Thomas West70歲，母親Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe30歲。他於1365年之前與Alice FitzHerbert在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於1386年9月3日在英國享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特可利斯丘其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas West于1321年出生在英国諾福爾可普斯亞德时，他的父亲Thomas West70岁，母亲Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe30岁。他于1365年之前与Alice FitzHerbert在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于1386年9月3日在英国享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特可利斯丘其。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas West was born in 1321, in Hempstead, Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas West, was 70 and his mother, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, was 30. He married Alice FitzHerbert before 1365, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1346. He died on 3 September 1386, in England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Christchurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas West est né en 1321, à Hempstead, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas West, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice FitzHerbert avant 1365, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1386, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Christchurch, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas West 1321 in Hempstead, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas West 70 und seine Mutter Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe 30. Er hat vor 1365 in Devon, England Alice FitzHerbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 3. September 1386 im Alter von 65 Jahren in England und wurde in Christchurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas West è nato il nel 1321 nel Hempstead, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas West, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Alice FitzHerbert prima del 1365, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Morì il 3 settembre 1386, nel England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Christchurch, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Westが1321年にイギリスノーフォルクヘンプステアドで生まれた時，父Thomas Westは70歳，母Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupeは30歳であった。1365年以前にイギリスデボンでAlice FitzHerbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は1386年9月3日にイギリスで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトチリストチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas West(이)가 1321년 영국 노르폴크 헤프스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas West(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1365년 이전 영국 데폰에서 Alice FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1386년 9월 3일 영국에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 크리스트c후르치에 묻혔다.

mn.Christchurch Priory Churchyard, Christch: Christchurch, Dorseteschyre, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas West nasceu em 1321, em Hempstead, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas West, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice FitzHerbert antes 1365, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1386, em Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Christchurch, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas West родился в 1321 г. в местности хемпстид, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas West было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice FitzHerbert перед 1365 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 3 сентября 1386 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности крисчурч, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas West nació en 1321, en Hempstead, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas West, tenía 70 años y su mamá, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Alice FitzHerbert antes de 1365, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1386, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Christchurch, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
